description: Shrubs, bushes, and low woody plants.
plants: Long canes curving outward in graceful arcs, forming a fountain of leaves that sways in any breeze.
A dense round mass of leaves and branches, thick enough to hide whatever is crouching behind it.
A low, hard dome of woody stems barely rising above the ground, shaped by wind into something almost deliberate.
Branches packed so tight that nothing passes through. Whatever is on the other side stays hidden.
Twisted and tough, with small waxy leaves that waste nothing. It survives where softer things cannot.
A low woody plant hugging the ground, too short to notice until you stumble into it.
Sparse branches letting light and wind pass through freely, more suggestion than barrier.
Woody at the base but soft and green above, as if it could not decide what kind of plant to be.
Multiple stems rising from the same root, branching thickly. Too short to be a tree, too stubborn to be ignored.
